risks.title: ValidationReport field correctness after element-grain removal
risks.mitigation: Graph.json already carries file-grain headerStatus from pipeline Phase 5. Confirm file-grain counts from graph nodes match current element-iteration counts before deleting.

risks.title: Existing tests rely on element-iteration internals
risks.mitigation: Run full test suite after Phase 2. buildFileHeaderStatusMap is exported — check test imports and update if needed.

risks.title: AC-05a / AC-05b frozen-fixture counts drift
risks.mitigation: Run frozen-fixture invariant tests immediately after Phase 2 code change. Both must read 2415===2415 and 263===263 before commit.

candidates.note: Iterates state.elements (element-grain) to produce file-grain header status map. Can be replaced with graph-node iteration (file-grain directly).
Also iterates state.elements for headerFact. Same pattern — file-grain data available from graph.

decision_records.decision: Use graph.json file-grain nodes as source for header status counts instead of state.elements iteration
decision_records.rationale: Graph.json is the single source of truth for file-grain facts post pipeline-rebuild Phase 5. element-iteration outside the analyzer is the smell concept #6 targets.

decision_records.decision: Chunk-grain skip-count paths in indexing-orchestrator.ts are NOT in scope
decision_records.rationale: chunksSkipped / chunksSkippedDetails are chunk-grain by design — the skip unit IS a chunk. No change needed.
